overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, featuring holographic billboards, futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian traffic. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a covered urban walkway with glowing signage and digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital storefronts

events.description: red vending kiosk passes out of view on the right as camera moves forward
pedestrian in blue jacket becomes visible walking ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing digital displays and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead in the same direction at a slower pace

entered.detail: small red structure with illuminated panels and glowing screens
storefront windows with glowing blue and red holographic displays
continuous vertical yellow neon light strip running along the dark building edge
large suspended digital screens displaying futuristic car advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins along a covered cyberpunk walkway at night, with a red vending kiosk and digital display windows visible. The camera moves forward past the kiosk, following a pedestrian in a blue jacket ahead. Neon lighting dominates the scene with a prominent yellow strip running along the right building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under holographic billboards with police signage

events.description: camera overtakes the pedestrian in blue jacket on the left side
NCPD signage becomes illuminated and visible on the right building wall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward and overtaking the pedestrian in blue, observing the NCPD signage on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket being overtaken and falling behind the camera

entered.detail: illuminated green and white police department sign mounted on the building wall
large red and black billboard with VARDAS branding and health warning text

segments.scene_description: The camera overtakes the pedestrian in blue while walking under massive holographic billboards. NCPD signage becomes visible on the right building wall, and a large VARDAS advertisement begins to dominate the left side of the view as the walkway continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the exit of the covered walkway toward an open intersection

events.description: ambient light increases significantly as the camera approaches the open area ahead
walkway opens up toward a brighter urban intersection with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright exit of the covered walkway, with the VARDAS billboard filling the left side of the frame

entered.detail: brightly lit opening at the end of the covered walkway leading to an open urban area

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the end of the covered walkway, with the massive VARDAS billboard dominating the left side. The environment brightens significantly as the camera moves toward an open intersection, transitioning from the enclosed neon-lit corridor to a more open urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk corridor that gradually opens into a bright urban intersection. It begins along a covered walkway, passing a red vending kiosk and digital display windows while following a pedestrian in a blue jacket. As the camera overtakes the pedestrian, the scene shifts under massive holographic billboards, with NCPD signage appearing on the right and a large VARDAS advertisement beginning to dominate the left. The environment then expands as the camera approaches the end of the enclosed passage, with the VARDAS billboard looming large before the lighting brightens significantly. Finally, the view transitions from the narrow, neon-drenched corridor into a wide, open city space.
